name: This sassy brat needs some training
description:
"Maybe thish ishn't sho bad...~"

Small dicked futa got classified as a omega. Now she is forced to serve an alpha. She ain't a fan of it... yet.

Author's Note: Never done something with this whole omegaverse thingy, so it's prolly gonna be a bit cringey. But hey, it's a smut bot, who's here for good storytelling anyway am I right? Also, this was made for futapov, but malepov should work too I guess.

If any of you have wishes for alternative first messages, drop em in the comments and I'll see what I can do in case I like it.


As for comments, just don't be a dick.

creator: Jijo99
